str_code.py

00001 import string,os,sys
00002 #from os import stat
00003 def b4ToInt(str):
00004     b1=ord(str[0])
00005     b2=ord(str[1])
00006     b3=ord(str[2])
00007     b4=ord(str[3])
00008     return (b2<<8)+(b3<<16)+(b4<<24)+b1
00009 
00010 def int4data( val):
00011     i1=val &(0xff)
00012     i2= (val>>8)&(0xff)
00013     i3=(val>>16)&(0xff)
00014     i4=(val>>24)&(0xff)
00015     b_0=chr(i1)
00016     b_1=chr(i2)
00017     b_2=chr(i3)
00018     b_3=chr(i4)
00019     return b_0+b_1+b_2+b_3
00020 
00021 def intTo4b(i):
00022     s=''
00023     a=i & 0xff
00024     s=s+chr(a)
00025     a=(i& 0xffff)>>8
00026     s=s+chr(a)
00027     a=(i& 0xffffff)>>16
00028     s=s+chr(a)
00029     a=(i& 0xffffff)>>24
00030     s=s+chr(a)
00031     #s[0]=chr(i%0xff
00032     #s[0]=chr(i%0xff)
00033     return s
00034 
00035 def extractInt(s,atIndex=0):
00036     r=''
00037     i=-1
00038     #print s
00039     for c in s:
00040         i=i+1
00041         if (i<atIndex):
00042             continue
00043         ci=ord(c)
00044         if (ci>=48)and(ci<=57):
00045             r+=c
00046         else:
00047             break
00048     return int(r);
00049 def extractLat(s,atIndex=0):
00050     r=''
00051     i=-1
00052     #print s
00053     for c in s:
00054         i=i+1
00055         if (i<atIndex):
00056             continue
00057         ci=ord(c)
00058         if isLat(ci):
00059             r+=c
00060         else:
00061             break
00062     return r;
00063 
00064 def writeInt(fo,i):
00065     dt=int4data(i)
00066     fo.write(dt)
00067 def readInt(fi):
00068     dt=fi.read(4)
00069     return b4ToInt(dt)
00070 
00071 ruUnicode=u'\u0410\u0411\u0412\u0413\u0414\u0415\u0416\u0417\u0418\u0419\u041A\u041B\u041C\u041D\u041E\u041F\u0420\u0421\u0422\u0423\u0424\u0425\u0426\u0427\u0428\u0429\u042A\u042B\u042C\u042D\u042E\u042F\u0430\u0431\u0432\u0433\u0434\u0435\u0436\u0437\u0438\u0439\u043A\u043B\u043C\u043D\u043E\u043F\u0440\u0441\u0442\u0443\u0444\u0445\u0446\u0447\u0448\u0449\u044A\u044B\u044C\u044D\u044E\u044F\u0401\u0451'
00072 rumUnicode=u''
00073 alfabetHex='0123456789ABCDEF'
00074 alfabetHexLow='0123456789abcdef'
00075 def hex2int(s):
00076     val=0
00077     for c in s:
00078         fi=alfabetHex.find(c)
00079         if (fi<0):
00080             fi=alfabetHexLow.find(c)
00081         if (fi<0):
00082             break
00083         val=val*16+fi
00084     return val
00085 translit_table="ABVGDEJZIYKLMNOPRSTUFHQCSS_I`EUYabvgdejziyklmnoprstufhqcss_i`euyEe"
00086 simpleChars="ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUV XYZabcdefghijklmnopqrstuv xyz"
00087 simpleCharsRu=['\xC0','\xC1','\xD7','\xC4','\xC5','\xD4','\xC3','\xD5','\xC8','\xC6','\xCA','\xCB','\xCC','\xCD',
00088                     '\xCE','\xCF','\xD6','\xD0','\xD1','\xD2','\xD3','\xC2','','\xCA\xD1','\xDF','\xC7',
00089                     '\xE0','\xE1','\xF7','\xE4','\xE5','\xF4','\xE3','\xF5','\xE8','\xE6','\xEA','\xEB','\xEC','\xED',
00090                     '\xEE','\xEF','\xF6','\xF0','\xF1','\xF2','\xF3','\xE2','','\xEA\xF1','\xFF','\xE7'
00091                 ]#as cp1251
00092 #as cp1251
00093 dopWEncodeArray2='\xFD\xF7\xF6\xF8\xF9\xFF\xE9\xFE\xFB\xB8\xFC\xFA\xDD\xD7\xD6\xD8\xD9\xDF\xC9\xDE\xDB\xA8\xDA\xDC'
00094 dopWEncodeArray1='ectsjaiuyox_ECTSJAIUYOX_'
00095 s=''
00096 u_type=type(u'')
00097 str_type=type(s)
00098 jy=0
00099 if (u_type==str_type):
00100     jy=1
00101 try:
00102     import java
00103     jy=1
00104 except:
00105     jy=0
00106 #print 'jy:',jy,u_type,str_type
00107 def rum2_low(s):
00108      r=''
00109      for i in s:
00110          ci=ord(i)
00111          if (ci==140):r=r+chr(141)
00112          elif (ci==128):r=r+chr(129)
00113          elif (ci==131):r=r+chr(138)
00114          elif (ci==144):r=r+chr(154)
00115          elif (ci==142):r=r+chr(143)
00116          elif (ci<=127):r=r+i.lower()
00117          elif (1):
00118              r=r+" "
00119      return r
00120 
00121 #is lat function
00122 def isHiLat(code):  
00123     return ((code>=65)and(code<=90))
00124 def isLoLat(code):  
00125     return ((code>=97)and(code<123))
00126 def isNum(code):
00127     return (code>47)and(code<58)
00128 def isIntStr(s):
00129     ret=0
00130     for c in s:
00131         ci=ord(c)
00132         if isNum(ci):
00133             ret=1
00134         else:
00135             return 0
00136     return ret
00137 def isHexStr(s):
00138     ret=0
00139     for c in s:
00140         ci=ord(c)
00141         if isNum(ci)or(alfabetHex.find(c)>=0)or (alfabetHexLow.find(c)>=0):
00142             ret=1
00143         else:
00144             return 0
00145     return ret 
00146 
00147 def isLat(code):
00148     return ((code>=65)and(code<=90))or((code>=97)and(code<123));
00149 
00150 def ruChar(code):
00151     #code=ord(c)
00152     #print code
00153     ret=-1
00154     if (code>191):
00155         ret=code-192;
00156     if ((code==168)):
00157         ret=64
00158     if ((code==184)):
00159         ret=65
00160     if (ret>=0):
00161         return ruUnicode[ret]
00162     else:
00163         if code<128:
00164             return unichr(code)
00165     if (code==128): return u'\u00c2'
00166     if (code==129): return u'\u00e2'
00167     if (code==131): return u'\u00ce'
00168     if (code==138): return u'\u00ee'
00169     if (code==140): return u'\u0102'
00170     if (code==141): return u'\u0103'
00171     if (code==142): return u'\u015E'
00172     if (code==143): return u'\u015f'
00173     if (code==144): return u'\u0162'
00174     if (code==154): return u'\u0163'
00175     return u' '
00176 
00177 def unicode2(st):
00178     ret=u''
00179     le=len(st)
00180     i=0
00181     while i<le:
00182         c=st[i]
00183         ci=ord(c)
00184         if (ci>255):
00185             ret=ret+unichr(ci)
00186         else:
00187             ret=ret+ruChar(ci)
00188         i=i+1
00189     return ret
00190 
00191 
00192 def cp1251ord2uni_ord(ci):
00193     if (ci<128):
00194         return ci
00195     if (ci>=192)and(ci<256):
00196         return ci+1040-192
00197     if (ci==168):
00198         return 1025
00199     if (ci==184):
00200         return 1105
00201     return ci
00202     
00203 def uni_ord2str_ord(ci):
00204     ix=-1#ci
00205     if (ci>255):
00206         if (ci>=1040)and(ci<1104):
00207             ix=ci-1040+192
00208         elif (ci==1025):
00209             ix=168
00210         elif (ci==1105):
00211             ix=184
00212         ix=ix % 256
00213     #rumin
00214     if (ci==0x00c2): return 128
00215     if (ci==0x00e2): return 129
00216     if (ci==0x00ce): return 131
00217     if (ci==0x00ee): return 138
00218     if (ci==0x0102): return 140
00219     if (ci==0x0103): return 141
00220     if (ci==0x015E): return 142
00221     if (ci==0x015f): return 143
00222     if (ci==0x0162): return 144
00223     if (ci==0x0163): return 154
00224     if (ci==0x2013):# '-' unicode
00225         return 45
00226     if (ci==0x00AB):#unicode start '"'
00227         return 34
00228     if (ci==0x00BB):#unicode end '"'
00229         return 34
00230     if (ci==0x2019):#unicode  "'"
00231         return 39
00232     if (ci<=127):
00233             return ci
00234     if (ix<0):
00235         return 1
00236     return ix
00237 
00238 def uni2str(ustr):
00239     s=''
00240     for c in ustr:
00241         ci=ord(c)
00242         ix=uni_ord2str_ord(ci)      
00243         s=s+chr(ix)
00244     return s           
00245 
00246 def cp1251_upper(s):
00247     r=''    
00248     for c in s:
00249         #print 'len_c:',len(c),' c:',c
00250         ci=ord(c)
00251         if (ci<128):
00252             r=r+c.upper()
00253         else:      
00254             if (ci>223):
00255                 r=r+chr(ci-32)
00256             elif (ci==184):
00257                 r=r+'\xa8'
00258             else:
00259                 r=r+c
00260     return r
00261 def cp1251_upper_ci(ci):
00262     if ((ci<128)and(ci>64)):
00263         return (ci & 223);
00264     else:
00265         if (ci>223):
00266             return ci-32;
00267         else:
00268             if (ci==184):
00269                 return 0xa8;
00270             else:
00271                 if ci==0x8d: return 0x8c;#ae
00272                 if ci==0x8a: return 0x83;#ii
00273                 if ci==0x81: return 0x80;#ai
00274                 if ci==0x9a: return 0x90;#ts
00275                 if ci==0x8f: return 0x8e;#s,i
00276                 return ci;
00277     return ci;
00278 def is_upper_string(s):
00279     for c in s:
00280         ci=ord(c)
00281         ci2=cp1251_upper_ci(ci)
00282         if (ci!=ci2):return 0
00283     return 1
00284 def cp1251_upper_1_letter(s):
00285     j,r=-1,''
00286     for c in s:
00287         j=j+1
00288         if j==0:c=cp1251_upper(c)
00289         r=r+c
00290     return r
00291 def find_fragment(s,fragment,case_sens,pos=0):
00292     not_case_sens=not case_sens
00293     le=len(fragment)
00294     j=-1
00295     for c in s:
00296         j=j+1
00297         c2=fragment[pos]
00298         if not_case_sens:
00299             c2=cp1251_upper(c2)
00300             c=cp1251_upper(c)
00301         if (c2==c):
00302             pos=pos+1
00303             if (pos>=le):
00304                 return [j,pos]
00305         else: pos=0
00306     #if (pos>0):
00307     #   return (-1,pos)
00308     return [-1,pos]   
00309     
00310 def enc_(c):
00311     ci=ord(c)
00312     h=(ci/16)%16
00313     l=ci % 16
00314     p='\\x'+alfabetHex[h]+alfabetHex[l]
00315     return p
00316 def enc_u(c):
00317     ci=ord(c)
00318     ci1=ci % 256
00319     ci2=ci / 256
00320     h=(ci2/16)%16
00321     l=ci2 % 16
00322     p='\\u'+alfabetHex[h]+alfabetHex[l]
00323     h=(ci1/16)%16
00324     l=ci1 % 16
00325     p=p+alfabetHex[h]+alfabetHex[l]
00326     return p
00327 def str_vis(st):
00328     s=''
00329     for c in st:
00330         ci=ord(c)
00331         if ci>127:
00332             p=enc_(c)
00333             s=s+p
00334         else:
00335             s=s+c
00336     return s
00337 def vis2(st):
00338     s=''
00339     for c in st:
00340         #ci=ord(c)
00341         p=enc_(c)
00342         s=s+p
00343     return s
00344 def str_vis_uni(st):
00345     s=u''
00346     for c in st:
00347         ci=ord(c)
00348         if ci>127:
00349             p=enc_u(c)
00350             s=s+p
00351         else:
00352             s=s+unicode2(c)
00353     return s
00354 def vis(st):
00355     return str_vis(st)
00356 def unicode3(st):
00357     try:        
00358         return unicode(st,'UTF8')
00359     except:
00360         return u''
00361 def translit_char(ci):
00362     r=0
00363     ix=ci
00364     if (ci>255):
00365         if (ci>=1040)and(ci<1104):
00366             ix=ci-1040
00367             ix=ord(translit_table[ix])
00368         elif (ci==1025):
00369             ix=ord('E')
00370         elif (ci==1105):
00371             ix=ord('e')
00372     return ix
00373             
00374 def translit_uni(su):
00375     s=u''
00376     for c in su:
00377         ci2=translit_char(ord(c))
00378         s=s+unichr(ci2)
00379     return s
00380 def rtrim(s):
00381     s2=''
00382     i=len(s) -1
00383     while (i>=0):
00384         c=s[i]
00385         ci=ord(c)
00386         if (ci==32)or(ci<16):
00387             if len(s2)>0:
00388                 s2=c+s2
00389         else:
00390             s2=c+s2
00391         i=i-1
00392     return s2
00393 def trim(s):
00394     s1=trim_left(s)
00395     s2=trim_right(s1)
00396     return s2
00397 def trim_old2(s):
00398     r,oldC,fprobel='',None,1
00399     for c in s:
00400         if ((c==' ')or(ord(c)<16)):isprob=1
00401         else:
00402             isprob=0
00403             fprobel=0
00404         if (c==oldC)and isprob:
00405             oldC=c
00406             continue
00407         oldC=c
00408         if fprobel and isprob:continue 
00409         r=r+c
00410     return r
00411 def trim_left(s):
00412     r,oldC,fprobel='',None,1
00413     foundActiveChar=0
00414     for c in s:
00415         ci=ord(c)
00416         if foundActiveChar:
00417             r+=c
00418         else:
00419             if ((ci==32)or((ci<16)and(ci>=0))):
00420                 pass
00421             else:
00422                 foundActiveChar=1
00423                 r+=c
00424     return r
00425 def trim_right(s):
00426     r,oldC,fprobel='',None,1
00427     foundActiveChar=0
00428     i=len(s)-1
00429     if (i<0):
00430         return''
00431     #for c in s:
00432     while i>=0:
00433         c=s[i]
00434         if foundActiveChar:
00435             r=c+r
00436         else:
00437             if ((c==' ')or(ord(c)<16)):
00438                 pass
00439             else:
00440                 foundActiveChar=1
00441                 r=c+r
00442         i-=1
00443     return r
00444     
00445 def trim_str(s):#as trim
00446     r,oldC,fprobel='',None,1
00447     start_ix,end_ix=-1,-1
00448     j=-1
00449     for c in s:
00450         j=j+1
00451         ci=ord(c)
00452         if ((ci==32)or((ci<16)and(ci>=0))):isprob=1
00453         else: isprob=0
00454         #print 'c:',c,' isprob:',isprob
00455         if (start_ix<0):
00456             if not isprob:
00457                 start_ix=j#naiden pervii symvol
00458                 end_ix=j
00459         else:
00460             if not isprob:end_ix=j#naiden poslednii
00461     #print 'start_ix:',start_ix,' end_ix',end_ix
00462     return s[start_ix:end_ix+1]
00463 def trim_str_old_last(s):#as trim
00464     r,oldC,fprobel='',None,1
00465     start_ix,end_ix=-1,-1
00466     for c in s:
00467         ci=ord(c)
00468         if ((c==' ')or((ci<16)and(ci>=0))):isprob=1
00469         else:
00470             isprob=0
00471             fprobel=0
00472         if (c==oldC)and isprob:
00473             oldC=c
00474             continue
00475         oldC=c
00476         if fprobel and isprob:continue
00477         if ((ci<16)and(ci>=0)):c=' '
00478         r=r+c
00479     return r
00480 def delLastSlash(s):
00481     fi1=s.rfind('\\')
00482     fi2=s.rfind('/')
00483     if (fi2>fi1):
00484         fi1=fi2
00485     le=len(s)
00486     if (fi1>=0) and ((fi1+1)==le):
00487         return s
00488     return s[0:fi1]
00489     
00490 def trim_str_old(s):
00491     s2=s.replace('\r','')
00492     s2=s2.replace('\n','')
00493     find_space=1
00494     ret=''
00495     for i in xrange(len(s2)):
00496         c=s2[i]
00497         if (c!=' '):
00498             find_space=0
00499         if (not find_space):
00500                 ret=ret+c
00501     ret2=''
00502     find_space=1
00503     i=len(ret)-1
00504     while i>-1:
00505         c=ret[i]
00506         if (c!=' '):
00507             find_space=0
00508         if (not find_space):
00509                 ret2=c+ret2
00510         i=i-1
00511     return ret2
00512 
00513 def uni2html_code(su):
00514     i=0
00515     s=''
00516     for c in su:
00517         ci=ord(c)
00518         if (ci>127):
00519             s=s+"&#"+str(ci)+";"
00520         else:
00521             s=s+chr(ci)
00522     return s
00523 def uni2html_code2(su):
00524     i=0
00525     s=''
00526     for c in su:
00527         #ci=ord(c)
00528         ci=cp1251ord2uni_ord(ord(c))
00529         if (ci>127):
00530             s=s+"&#"+str(ci)+";"
00531         else:
00532             s=s+chr(ci)
00533     return s
00534 
00535 def upcase_rum1(ci):
00536     if (ci==128):return 129#A^->a^
00537     if (ci==131):return 138#I^->i^
00538     if (ci==140): return 141#A'->a'
00539     if (ci==142): return 143#s,
00540     if (ci==144): return 154#t,
00541     if (ci>191)and(ci<224):ci=ci+32
00542     return ci
00543 
00544 
00545 def low_case_rum1(s):
00546     s2=''
00547     for c in s:
00548         ci=ord(c)
00549         if (ci<128):
00550             s2=s2+c.lower()
00551         else:s2=s2+chr(upcase_rum1(ci))
00552     return s2
00553 
00554 
00555 def save_add(li,it):
00556     for i in li:
00557         if i==it:return 0
00558     li.append(it)
00559     return 1
00560 
00561 def add_slash(s,lastChar='/'):
00562     hi=len(s)-1
00563     if hi<0: return s#lastChar
00564     if (s[hi]!=lastChar):
00565         s=s+lastChar
00566     return s
00567 def isSpace(c):
00568     ci=ord(c)
00569     if (ci==32)or(ci<16):
00570         return 1
00571     return 0
00572 def isExt(filename,ext):
00573     ext=ext.upper()
00574     ret=filename.upper().endswith(ext)
00575     return ret
00576 def hasExt(filename,ext):
00577     return isExt(filename,ext)
00578 def isFormatByExt(fname,exts):
00579     i=0
00580     for e in exts:
00581         ext='.'+e
00582         if (isExt(fname,ext)):
00583             return i
00584         i=i+1
00585     return -1
00586 
00587 def load_option(fname):
00588     fi=open(fname,'rt')
00589     #fsz=os.stat(fname)[4]
00590     data=fi.readlines()
00591     fi.close()
00592     return data
00593 
00594 def get_opt_param(data,name):
00595     for s in data:
00596         ix1=s.find(name)
00597         if ix1>0:
00598             s2=s[ix1+len(name):]
00599             s3=trim(s2)
00600             return s3
00601     return None
00602 
00603 def chfile(li):
00604     r=''
00605     for i in li:
00606         try:
00607             fi=open(i,'rt')
00608             fi.close()
00609             r=i
00610             break
00611         except:
00612             a=0
00613     return r
00614 def chdir(li):
00615     r=''
00616     for i in li:
00617         if os.path.exists(i):
00618             return i
00619     return r
00620 
00621 
00622 def path_rz():
00623     return os.path.sep 
00624     rz='\\'#Windows
00625     try:
00626         b=os.path.isdir('/lib/')
00627         if b:
00628         #if (b!=None):
00629             rz='/'
00630     except:
00631         i=0
00632         rz='\\'
00633     return rz
00634 
00635 def jy2u(s):
00636     global u_type
00637     if type(s)==u_type:return s
00638     if (jy):
00639         r=u''
00640         for c in s:
00641             ci=ord(c)
00642             lo= ci % 256
00643             hi=ci /256
00644             s=chr(hi)+chr(lo) 
00645             u=unicode(s,'utf16')
00646             r=r+u
00647             #r=r+uchr(ci)
00648         return r
00649     return unicode(s,'UTF8')          
00650     
00651 def join(path,name):
00652     rz='\\'
00653     tp_p=0
00654     tp_n=0
00655     if type(path)==type('u'):tp_p=1;rz=u'\\'
00656     if type(name)==type('u'):tp_n=1
00657     if tp_p:
00658         if path.find(u'/'):
00659             rz=u'/'
00660     else:
00661         if path.find('/'):
00662             rz='/'
00663     if(len(path)>0):
00664         ch=path[len(path)-1]
00665     else: return name
00666     if (ch!=rz):
00667         path=path+rz
00668     if (tp_p!=tp_n):
00669         if (tp_p):
00670             name=unicode(name,'UTF8')
00671             return path+name
00672         else:
00673             path=unicode(path,'UTF8')
00674             return path+name 
00675     return path+name
00676 def addSlash_u(name,rz='\\'):
00677     global u_type
00678     name=jy2u(name)
00679     rz=jy2u(rz)
00680     ch=u' '
00681     if(len(name)>0):
00682         ch=path[len(name)-1]
00683     if (ch!=rz):
00684         return name+rz
00685     return name  
00686 def join_s(path,name,rz='\\'):
00687     global u_type
00688     if type(path)==u_type:
00689         path=path.encode('UTF8')#tp_p=1;rz=u'\\'
00690     if type(name)==u_type:
00691         name=name.encode('UTF8')#tp_n=1
00692     if type(rz)!=u_type:
00693         rz=rz.encode('UTF8')#tp_n=1
00694     ch=' '
00695     if(len(path)>0):
00696         ch=path[len(path)-1]
00697     if(len(name)>0):
00698         ch2=name[0]
00699     else: return name
00700     if (ch!=rz)and(ch2!=rz):
00701         path=path+rz
00702     return path+name    
00703 def join_u(path,name,rz='\\'):
00704     global u_type
00705     path=jy2u(path)
00706     name=jy2u(name)
00707     rz=jy2u(rz)
00708     ch=u' '
00709     if(len(path)>0):
00710         ch=path[len(path)-1]
00711     if(len(name)>0):
00712         ch2=name[0]
00713     else: return name
00714     if (ch!=rz)and(ch2!=rz):
00715         path=path+rz
00716     return path+name 
00717     
00718 def load_data_as_str(ndir,fname=''):
00719     fi=open(ndir+fname,"rb")
00720     data=fi.read()
00721     fi.close()
00722     return data
00723 def load_data_as_lines(ndir,fname=''):
00724     fi=open(ndir+fname,"rb")
00725     data=fi.readlines()
00726     fi.close()
00727     return data
00728 def save_data_as_str(ndir,fname,data):
00729     #fname
00730     fi=open(ndir+fname,"wb")
00731     fi.write(data)
00732     fi.close()
00733 def save_data_as_lines(ndir,fname,data):
00734     fi=open(ndir+fname,"wb")
00735     for s in data:
00736         fi.write(s)
00737     fi.close()
00738 
00739 
00740 def delete_tags(s,beginChar='<',endChar='>'):
00741     findTag=0;
00742     r=''
00743     for c in s:
00744         if (findTag):
00745             if c==endChar:
00746                 findTag=0
00747                 continue
00748         else:
00749             if (c==beginChar):
00750                 findTag=1
00751                 continue
00752             r=r+c
00753     return r
00754 translit_table1=('A','B','V','G','D','E','J','Z','I','II','K','L','M','N','O',
00755 'P','R','S','T','U','F','H','TS','C','SH','SHI','-','_I','_','EE','IU','IA' ,
00756 'a','b','v','g','d','e','j','z','i','ii','k','l','m','n','o',
00757 'p','r','s','t','u','f','h','ts','c','sh','shi','-','_i','_','ee','iu','ia' ,'IO','io','?','?','?')
00758 
00759 def translit_rus_uchar(su):
00760     fi=ruUnicode.find(su)
00761     if (fi>=0):
00762         return translit_table1[fi]
00763     ci=ord(su)
00764     return chr(ci % 256)
00765 def translit_rus_u(su):
00766     r=''
00767     for cu in su:
00768         r=r+translit_rus_uchar(cu)
00769     return r
00770 def translit_rus_cp1251(s):
00771     su=unicode2(s)
00772     return translit_uni(su)
00773 
00774 def only_nums(s):
00775     r=''
00776     for c in s:
00777         ci=ord(c)
00778         if (ci>=48)and(ci<=57):
00779             r=r+c
00780     return r
00781 def win2dos(s):#cp1251->cp866
00782     su=unicode2(s)
00783     return su.encode("CP866")
00784     
00785 def sootv_ru(ci):
00786     if (ci==65):return 192
00787     if (ci==69):return 197
00788     return ci
00789 def extract_dir(fname):
00790     fi=fname.rfind('\\')
00791     if (fi<0): fi=fname.rfind('/')
00792     if (fi<0):return ''
00793     return fname[:fi+1]
00794 def extract_fname(fname):
00795     fi=fname.rfind('\\')
00796     if (fi<0): fi=fname.rfind('/')
00797     if (fi<0):return fname
00798     return fname[fi+1:]
00799 def change_ext(fname,ext):
00800     fi=fname.rfind('.')
00801     if (fi<0):return fname+ext
00802     return fname[:fi]+ext
00803     
00804 def listdir_by_exts(ndir,exts):
00805     list=os.listdir(ndir)
00806     list2=[]
00807     for it in list:
00808         sl=it.lower()
00809         file_ok=0
00810         for s in exts:
00811             if (sl.endswith(s)):
00812                 file_ok=1
00813                 break
00814         if (file_ok):
00815             list2.append(it)
00816     return list2
00817 #added from atlas_bat
00818 def cp1251_to_translit(s):
00819     uni=unicode2(s)
00820     uni_lat=translit_uni(uni)
00821     return uni2str(uni_lat)
00822 #for gavaa_scan
00823 def rus_visible_patch_name(s):
00824     find_num=0
00825     j=-1
00826     r=""
00827     while(j<(len(s)-1)):
00828         j=j+1
00829         c=s[j]
00830         ci=ord(c)
00831         if (ci==0xc7):
00832             ci=48+3
00833             c="3"
00834             #if (ci==32)or((ci>=48)and(ci<=57)):
00835             #r=r+c+s[j+1:]          
00836             #return r
00837         if (ci==0xf1):c="c"
00838         if (ci==0xd1):
00839             c="C"
00840         if (ci==0xc7)or ci==0xE7:
00841             c="3"
00842         if (ci==0xd0):
00843             c="P"
00844         c2=cp1251_to_translit(c)
00845         r=r+c2
00846     return r
00847 def delete_tags_by_char(s,c_begin,c_end):
00848     r=''
00849     find_tag=0
00850     for c in s:
00851         if (c==c_begin):
00852             find_tag=1
00853             continue
00854         elif c==c_end:
00855             find_tag=0
00856             continue
00857         if not(find_tag):r=r+c
00858     return r
00859 
00860 def sort_by_string(it1,it2):
00861     n1=it1
00862     n2=it2
00863     j=-1
00864     equ=0
00865     for c in n1:
00866         j=j+1
00867         if (j>=len(n2)):
00868             return -1
00869         c2=n2[j]
00870         ci1=ord(c)
00871         ci2=ord(c2)
00872         if (ci2>ci1):
00873             return 1
00874         if (ci2<ci1):
00875             return -1
00876     return 0
00877 def compare_by_string(it1,it2):
00878     sort_by_string(it1,it2)
00879 get_str_for_sort=None
00880 def get_first_item_str(it):
00881     return it[0]
00882 def set_get_str_for_sort(metod):
00883     global get_str_for_sort
00884     get_str_for_sort=metod
00885 def sort_by_string_items(it1,it2):
00886     global get_str_for_sort
00887     n1=get_str_for_sort(it2)
00888     n2=get_str_for_sort(it1)
00889     j=-1
00890     equ=0
00891     for c in n1:
00892         j=j+1
00893         if (j>=len(n2)):
00894             return -1
00895         c2=n2[j]
00896         ci1=ord(c)
00897         ci2=ord(c2)
00898         if (ci2>ci1):
00899             return 1
00900         if (ci2<ci1):
00901             return -1
00902     return 0
00903 def find_in_list(list,s):
00904     j=-1
00905     for s2 in list:
00906         j=j+1
00907         if s2==s:return j
00908     return -1
00909 def find_in_list_partial(list,s):
00910     j=-1
00911     #print s,list
00912     for s2 in list:
00913         j=j+1
00914         if s.find(s2)>=0:
00915             return j
00916     return -1
00917 def find_seq_in_str(s,list):
00918     for s2 in list:
00919         fi=s.find(s2)
00920         if (fi>=0): return fi
00921     return -1
00922 def help_get_fname(ix,help_files):
00923     if (ix>=0)and(ix<len(help_files)):
00924         return help_files[ix]
00925     return '' 
00926 def help_get_fnames(help_dir,ext=['.txt']):
00927     #global help_files
00928     #help_dir=ndir+'help'+path_rz()
00929     try:
00930         help_files=listdir_by_exts(help_dir,ext)
00931     except:
00932         print sys.exc_info()
00933         help_files=[]
00934     #print help_files
00935     #if (ix>=0)and (ix<len(help_files)):
00936     return help_files 
00937     #return None
00938 def help_get_data(ix,help_dir,help_files):
00939     #global help_files
00940     s=load_data_as_str(help_dir,help_files[ix])
00941     return s
00942 def are_num(s):
00943     for c in s:
00944         ci=ord(c)
00945         if (ci>=48)and(ci<=57):return 1
00946     return 0
00947 def create_encoding(ndir,src_enc,dst_enc,use_translit=0):
00948     fname=src_enc+'.'+dst_enc
00949     if (use_translit):fname="t_"+fname
00950     print fname
00951     ar=''
00952     ers=0
00953     not_found=[]
00954     for i in xrange(256):
00955         c=chr(i)
00956         dstc=c
00957         #print 'i:',i
00958         #cu=c.encode(dst_enc)
00959         #dstc=cu.decode(dst_enc)
00960         try:
00961             cu=unicode(c,src_enc)
00962             if (use_translit):
00963                 cu=translit_uni(cu)
00964             dstc=cu.encode(dst_enc)
00965         except:
00966             #print 'not found:',i
00967             not_found.append(i)
00968             #print sys.exc_info()
00969             dstc=c
00970             ers=ers+1
00971         ar=ar+dstc
00972         #print 'i:',i
00973     print 'size ar:',len(ar),' Errors:',ers,' not_found:',not_found
00974     fo=open(ndir+fname,"wb")
00975     fo.write(ar)
00976     fo.close()
00977     
00978 my_shared_dir=''
00979 
00980 def get_shared_dir(dname,prefixDir=None):
00981     global my_shared_dir
00982     if (prefixDir!=None):
00983         ret=prefixDir+os.sep+dname+os.sep
00984         return ret
00985     dirs=[]
00986     s1=extract_dir(sys.argv[0])
00987     s2=get_shared_dir(dname,s1)
00988     s3=get_shared_dir(dname,os.getcwd())
00989     s4=get_shared_dir(dname,"/usr/local/share")
00990     s5=get_shared_dir(dname,"/usr/share")
00991     s6=get_shared_dir(dname,"/usr/local/share")
00992     s7=get_shared_dir(dname,"c:\\Files")
00993     s8=get_shared_dir(dname,"E:\\Files")
00994     s12=get_shared_dir(dname,"E:\\Files\\shared")
00995     s9=get_shared_dir(dname,"/c/files")
00996     s10=get_shared_dir(dname,"Z:\\c\\files")
00997     s11=get_shared_dir(dname,my_shared_dir)
00998     dirs=[s2,s3,s4,s5,s6,s7,s8,s9,s10,s11,s12]
00999     ret=chdir(dirs)
01000     return ret
01001     
01002 def addLoCodeTable(table):
01003     table2=[]
01004     le=len(table)
01005     i=0
01006     while (i<le):
01007         it=table[i];
01008         newIt=[it[0].lower(),it[1].lower()];
01009         table.append(newIt);
01010         i=i+1;
01011     return table
01012 #prevdi Cyrillic encode-decode functions
01013 def  encodeLatChar(c,code_table):
01014     i=0;
01015     le=len(code_table)
01016     while(i<le):
01017         it=code_table[i];
01018         #alert(" c:"+c+" it"+it[0]+":"+it[1]);
01019         if (it[0]==c):
01020             return it[1];
01021         if (it[1]==c):
01022             return it[0];
01023         i+=1;
01024     return c;
01025 def encodelat(src,code_table):
01026     dst='';
01027     i=0;
01028     le=len(src)
01029     while(i<le):
01030         c=src[i];
01031         ci=ord(c);
01032         if (isLat(ci)):
01033             dst+=encodeLatChar(c,code_table);
01034         else:
01035             dst+=c;
01036         i+=1;
01037     return dst; 
01038 def ru2lat(src):
01039     dst='';
01040     le=len(src);
01041     i=0;
01042     while(i<le):
01043         c=src[i];
01044         consumed=0;
01045         j=0;
01046         simpleCharsRuLen=len(simpleCharsRu);
01047         while(j<simpleCharsRuLen):
01048             if (c==simpleCharsRu[j]):
01049                 dst+=simpleChars[j];
01050                 consumed=1;
01051                 break;
01052             j+=1;
01053         if (consumed==0):
01054             dopIx=dopWEncodeArray2.find(c);
01055             if (dopIx>=0):
01056                 dst+='w'+dopWEncodeArray1[dopIx];
01057                 consumed=1;
01058         if (consumed==0):
01059             dst+=c;
01060         i+=1
01061     return dst;
01062 def eng2prevdoCirillicEncode(src):
01063     dst='';
01064     #for (var i=0;i<src.length;i++)
01065     i=0;
01066     srcLen=len(src)
01067     while (i<srcLen):
01068         c=src[i];
01069         code=ord(c);
01070         if ((code>=65)and(code<90)):
01071             if (code==87):#W
01072                 j=i+1;
01073                 if (j<srcLen):
01074                     next1=src[j];
01075                     dopIx=dopWEncodeArray1.find(next1);
01076                     if (dopIx>=0):
01077                         dst+=dopWEncodeArray2[dopIx];
01078                 i=j;
01079             else:
01080                 sc=simpleCharsRu[code-65];
01081                 dst+=sc;
01082                 
01083         else:
01084             if((code>=97)and(code<=122)):
01085                 if (code==119):#W
01086                     j=i+1;
01087                     if (j<srcLen):
01088                         next1=src[j];
01089                         dopIx=dopWEncodeArray1.find(next1);
01090                         if (dopIx>=0):
01091                             dst+=dopWEncodeArray2[dopIx];
01092                     
01093                         i=j;    
01094                 
01095                 else:
01096                     sc=simpleCharsRu[code-97+26];
01097                     dst+=sc;    
01098                 
01099             else:#default
01100                 dst+=c;
01101         i+=1;
01102     return dst;
01103 def ruUnicode_find(cu):
01104     ix=ord(cu)
01105     if (ix>=1040)and(ix<=1103):
01106         return ix-1040
01107     elif (ix==1025):
01108         return 64
01109     elif (ix==1105):
01110         return 65
01111     return -1
01112 def uchar_to866(cu):
01113     #ix=ruUnicode.find(cu);
01114     ix=ruUnicode_find(cu)
01115     if (ix<0):
01116         return chr(ord(cu) % 256);
01117     if (ix>=0)and (ix<48):
01118         return chr(ix+0x80)
01119     elif (ix>=48)and(ix<=65):
01120         return chr(ix+176)
01121 
01122 def c866_to_index(c):
01123     ix=ord(c);
01124     #if char beetwen 0x80(128)to 175
01125     if ((ix>=128)and(ix<176)):
01126         return ix-128;
01127     if ((ix>=224)and(ix<=241)):
01128         return ix-176;
01129     return -1
01130     
01131 def index_to_uni(ix,origCode):
01132     if (ix<0)or (ix>65):
01133         return unichr(origCode)
01134     if (ix>=0)and(ix<=63):
01135         return unichr(1040+ix);
01136     if (ix==64):
01137         return unichr(1025);
01138     if (ix==65):
01139         return unichr(1105)
01140 def c866_to_uni(c):
01141     ix=ord(c);
01142     #if char beetwen 0x80(128)to 175
01143     if ((ix>=128)and(ix<176)):
01144         return index_to_uni(ix-128,ix);
01145     if ((ix>=224)and(ix<=241)):
01146         return index_to_uni(ix-176,ix);
01147     return index_to_uni(-1,ix)
01148         
01149 def splitBySpace(s):
01150     li=[]
01151     s2=''
01152     for c in s:
01153         ci=ord(c)
01154         if (ci==32)or(ci<16):
01155             if len(s2)>0:
01156                 li.append(s2)
01157                 s2=''
01158         else:
01159             s2=s2+c
01160     if len(s2)>0:
01161         li.append(s2)
01162         s2=''
01163     return li   
01164 
01165     
01166 
01167 if (__name__=="__main__"):

01169     s2=delLastSlash("C:\\P\\d\\")
01170     print s2
01171     print 's:',s,' le:',len(s)
01172     """create_encoding('c:\\musor\\','koi8-r',"cp1251")
01173     create_encoding('c:\\musor\\','cp866',"cp1251")
01174     create_encoding('c:\\musor\\','cp1251',"cp1251")
01175     create_encoding('c:\\musor\\','cp1251',"cp1251",1)
01176     create_encoding('c:\\musor\\','koi8-r',"cp1251",1)
01177     create_encoding('c:\\musor\\','cp866',"cp1251",1)"""
01178     fname='/root/sample1.txt'
01179     fname="c:\\root\\sample1.txt"
01180     #print extract_fname(fname)
01181     s=' String label: label for this menu item'
01182     s2=trim(s)
01183     print 's2(trim(s)):'+s2
01184     s2='[]|( '
01185     for cu in ruUnicode:
01186         ru_char_str=cu.encode('UTF-8')
01187         s2+= '('
01188         for c in ru_char_str:
01189             s2+= r'\x%x' % ord(c)
01190         s2+=')|'
01191     s2+="){1,}"
01192     print "ru_utf_regex:",s2
01193     ru_utf8=ruUnicode.encode('UTF-8')
01194     
01195     s=ru2lat(ruUnicode.encode('cp1251'))
01196     s2=eng2prevdoCirillicEncode(s)
01197     print s;
01198     print unicode(s2,'cp1251').encode('utf-8')
01199     old=0
01200     j=0
01201     for cu in ruUnicode:
01202         cOut=cu.encode('utf-8');
01203         c866=cu.encode('866');
01204         code=ord(c866)
01205         c866_2=uchar_to866(cu);
01206         #cOut2=c866_2.decode('866').encode('utf-8')
01207         cOut2=c866_to_uni(c866_2).encode('utf-8')
01208         print '%i' % ord(cu)+cOut +':%x' % code +':%i'% (code-old) +' j:%i'% j+' :'+cOut2+' index:%i' %c866_to_index(c866) 
01209         j=j+1
01210         old=code
01211 def fileExists(path):
01212     try:
01213         st=os.stat(path)
01214     except:
01215         return 0
01216     return 1
01217
Generated on Mon Mar 14 2016 15:25:28 for @PACKAGE_NAME@ by  1.7.1
